raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left side of box_1 is reachable and unobstructed. Adequate workspace exists for the left arm to press gently against the side of box_1 without colliding with box_2 or other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is held firmly against the tabletop by the left arm, preventing it from sliding when the top box is pushed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right side of box_2 is exposed and the area to the right-rear of the box is free of obstacles, allowing a sideways push that shears any light attachment tape.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is slid laterally to the right and is no longer on top of or attached to box_1, leaving box_1 fully exposed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 has been cleared from the top of box_1. Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right sides of box_1, and there is sufficient vertical clearance to lift the box.",
    "Postcondition": "The robot securely grasps box_1 with both arms, lifts it slightly off the tabletop, and is now holding the darker box as required."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left side of box_1 is reachable and unobstructed. Adequate workspace exists for the left arm to press gently against the side of box_1 without colliding with box_2 or other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is held firmly against the tabletop by the left arm, preventing it from sliding when the top box is pushed.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right side of box_2 is exposed and the area to the right-rear of the box is free of obstacles, allowing a sideways push that shears any light attachment tape.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is slid laterally to the right and is no longer on top of or attached to box_1, leaving box_1 fully exposed.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 has been cleared from the top of box_1. Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right sides of box_1, and there is sufficient vertical clearance to lift the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The robot securely grasps box_1 with both arms, lifts it slightly off the tabletop, and is now holding the darker box as required.
